hooks.command: bash -c 'title="Claude Code" msg="Career Brand needs your attention"; case "$(uname -s)" in Darwin) osascript -e "display notification \"$msg\" with title \"$title\"" 2>/dev/null;; Linux) command -v notify-send >/dev/null && notify-send "$title" "$msg" 2>/dev/null;; *) command -v powershell.exe >/dev/null && powershell.exe -Command "[System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show(\"$msg\", \"$title\")" 2>/dev/null;; esac; true'
